response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Successfully matched the reference lyrics for 'Pasti Bisa' and 'Chiisana Koi no Uta'.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics and manually transcribed the spoken English dialogue section.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles to follow the vocal flow of the songs and the exact timing of the character's spoken lines.

subtitles.english: ...with a smile.
I can definitely do it.
Enjoy it all and face it.
I am sure I can definitely do it.

subtitles.original: Dan ku jalani hidupku dengan senyuman.
subtitles.english: And I'll live my life with a smile.
Hahaha!
Oh... This room is... different?
Eh? Hobby? Sleeping.

subtitles.original: Does this thing know if I lie? Whatever. Sleeping.
subtitles.english: Does this thing know if I lie? Whatever. Sleeping.

subtitles.original: Ah, stop asking me the same question. Sleeping. I love sleeping.
subtitles.english: Ah, stop asking me the same question. Sleeping. I love sleeping.

subtitles.original: Is this some kind of joke? My hobby is anything except answering the same questions over and over again.
subtitles.english: Is this some kind of joke? My hobby is anything except answering the same questions over and over again.

subtitles.original: Can the door just please open? I've had enough of this.
subtitles.english: Can the door just please open? I've had enough of this.
No, I refuse to answer.
Ah, whatever.

subtitles.original: Oh! Finally a different one, and an easy one too! Eight! Tentu aja eight! Of course, eight!
subtitles.english: Oh! Finally a different one, and an easy one too! Eight! Of course eight! Of course, eight!

subtitles.original: 広い宇宙の数ある一つ
subtitles.english: One of many in this wide universe,

subtitles.original: 青い地球の広い世界で
subtitles.english: in the great world of this blue earth...

subtitles.original: 小さな恋の思いは届く
subtitles.english: This tiny feeling of love will reach you,

subtitles.original: 小さな島のあなたのもとへ
subtitles.english: on the little island, to where you are.

subtitles.original: あなたと出会い 時は流れる
subtitles.english: Since we met, time has been flowing,

subtitles.original: 思いを込めた手紙も増える
subtitles.english: the letters filled with my feelings grow in number.

subtitles.original: いつしか二人互いに響く
subtitles.english: Before we knew it, we are echoing between each other,

subtitles.original: 時に激しく 時に切なく
subtitles.english: sometimes intensely, sometimes sadly.

subtitles.original: 響くは遠く 遥か彼方へ
subtitles.english: Echoing distantly, to far, far away,

subtitles.original: 優しい歌は世界を変える
subtitles.english: this gentle song changes the world.

subtitles.original: ほら あなたにとって大事な人ほど
subtitles.english: Look, the more important someone is to you...
...the closer they are to you.

subtitles.original: ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい
subtitles.english: I just want it to reach you, and only you.
Let this love song echo!
Look...
Look...
Look...
Let this love song echo!

subtitles.original: あなたは気づく 二人は歩く
subtitles.english: You notice that we walk together,

subtitles.original: 暗い道でも 日々照らす月
subtitles.english: even on dark roads, the moon shines on us daily.

subtitles.original: 握りしめた手 離すことなく
subtitles.english: Never letting go of our tightly held hands,

subtitles.original: 思いは強く 永遠誓う
subtitles.english: my feelings are strong, swearing for eternity.

subtitles.original: 永遠の淵 きっと僕は言う
subtitles.english: From the depths of eternity, I'm sure I'll say,

subtitles.original: 思い変わらず 同じ言葉を
subtitles.english: the same words, with my feelings unchanged.
Even that won't be enough...
...so they turn to tears...
...and become joy...
...unable to speak...
...I just hold you close.
I just hold you close.

subtitles.original: ほら あなたにとって大事な人ほど
subtitles.english: Look, the more important someone is to you...
...the closer they are to you.

subtitles.original: ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい
subtitles.english: I just want it to reach you, and only you.
Let this love song echo!
Look...
Look...
Look...
Let this love song echo!
If this is a dream, please don't wake me up,
if this is a dream, please don't wake me up.
The time I spent with you...
...will become an eternal star.

subtitles.english: Look, the more important someone is to you...
...the closer they are to you.

subtitles.original: ただ あなたにだけ届いて欲しい
subtitles.english: I just want it to reach you, and only you.
Let this love song echo!
